---
title: "User Guide"
---

## Getting Started

This guide explains how to use the IS428 VABITeam interactive dashboard.

## System Requirements

- Modern web browser (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge)
- Internet connection
- No installation required

## Accessing the Dashboard

1. Go to [your dashboard link](https://your-dashboard-link.com)
2. The dashboard will load automatically in your browser

---

## Dashboard Features

### 1. Filters Panel

![Filters Panel](images/guide_filters.png)

Use the left-hand panel to filter data by:

- **Date Range** — Select a start and end date
- **Category** — Choose one or multiple categories
- **Region** — Filter by geographic region

### 2. Main Chart Area

![Main Chart](images/guide_chart.png)

- Hover over any data point to see detailed tooltips
- Click a bar/point to drill down into that segment
- Use the legend to show/hide specific series

### 3. Summary Cards

![Summary Cards](images/guide_cards.png)

The top row shows key metrics that update dynamically based on your filter selections.

### 4. Export

- Click the **Download** button to export the current view as PNG or CSV

---

## Troubleshooting

| Issue | Solution |
|-------|----------|
| Dashboard not loading | Refresh the page or clear browser cache |
| Filters not responding | Try resetting filters using the Reset button |
| Charts appear blank | Check your internet connection |

---

## Contact

For questions or feedback, contact the team at **is428vabiteam@smu.edu.sg**
